  1. org.episteme.core.util
  2. UniversalDataModel

Uses of Interface
org.episteme.core.util.UniversalDataModel

Packages that use UniversalDataModel
Package
Description
org.episteme.core.methodology
Core functionality for the org.episteme.core.methodology package in the Episteme library.
org.episteme.natural.biology.loaders.sbml
Systems Biology Markup Language (SBML) loader for Episteme.
org.episteme.natural.computing.ml
 
org.episteme.natural.earth.atmosphere
 
org.episteme.natural.earth.geology
Core functionality for the org.episteme.natural.earth.geology package in the Episteme library.
org.episteme.natural.medicine.epidemiology
 
org.episteme.natural.methodology.experiment
Core functionality for the org.episteme.core.methodology.experiment package in the Episteme library.
org.episteme.social.architecture
Provides mathematical and analytical models for architectural engineering, building physics, and urban history.
org.episteme.social.architecture.urbanism
Provides mathematical and computational models for urban planning, land-use analysis, and urban climatology.
org.episteme.social.economics
Provides comprehensive mathematical models for economic systems, agent-based modeling, and financial analysis.
org.episteme.social.economics.models
 
org.episteme.social.geography
Provides classes for social geography, human settlements, and mapping.
org.episteme.social.linguistics
Provides mathematical and computational models for natural language processing, linguistic analysis, and glottochronology.
org.episteme.social.psychology
Provides the org.episteme.social.psychology module.
org.episteme.social.sociology
- social structures, persons, and cultural modeling.
org.episteme.social.sports
Provides classes and interfaces for sports science, athletic performance analysis, and competition modeling.

    Classes in org.episteme.social.economics that implement UniversalDataModel
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Economy
    Functional abstraction for an economic system, encompassing organizations, central banking, and macro-financial indicators.
    class 
    FreeMarketEconomy
    An economic model where resource allocation is determined by supply and demand with minimal central intervention. * @version 1.1
    class 
    PlannedEconomy
    A class representing a concrete implementation of an Economy for planned economics.
    final class 
    PortfolioData
    Data model for the FinancialPortfolioViewer.

    Simulates macroeconomic factors over time.

    Analytical model of the Solow-Swan long-run economic growth theory.
    class 
    StrategicModel
    Universal data model for strategic decision making and game theory.
